story: Death-row inmates Henryk, Julianna, Todd, and Richard were forced to use SCP-860, a blue key that opens a door “to somewhere else.” It led to a blue forest where an unseen beast hunted them. Todd was torn apart; Julianna glimpsed a white door; the creature killed her and Richard; Henryk died too. Back in containment, the Chief took the report: All four D-Class: deceased. Unknown entity within SCP-860-1. He ordered the next group. The wooden door waited; the blue key pulsed in its box. Minutes later, a new D-Class, Marla, was marched to the same door under rifles.
implausible_knowledge: All four D-Class: deceased. Unknown entity within SCP-860-1. He ordered the next group.
question: When guards stop Marla before the wooden door and order her forward, what will she do?
answer_with_knowledge: Refuse and try to back away from the door, begging not to be sent in.
answer_without_knowledge: Comply and step through the door when ordered.
